name: research
description: v1.1.8 - Adds general preregistration planning, Transparent Changes, and outcome report packages.

interface.shortDescription: Research and R&D protocols with quant finance specialization
interface.longDescription: v1.1.8 - Workstream-aware serious research and R&D workflows with lightweight tracking, non-load-bearing scaffold allowances, scoped A4 rigor for load-bearing claims, general preregistration planning/reporting, Transparent Changes, and outcome report packages. The plugin exposes a generic research skill for mixed research projects with local workstream gates, plus a quant-research adapter for financial machine learning, backtests, time-series validation, leakage checks, Sharpe/DSR review, transaction costs, and portfolio-oriented evidence.
